welcome.subtitle: We'll help you split every payment between needs and debt repayment.
welcome.feature1: Split your income with one tap
welcome.privacy: Your data stays only on your phone. We don't send anything.

typeHints.payday_loan: Provident, Wonga, Vivus etc. — short-term loan with high interest.
typeHints.credit: Bank loan with fixed monthly installments, e.g. cash loan, consolidation.
typeHints.credit_card: Credit card with revolving limit. Minimum payment is % of balance.
typeHints.installment: Buy-now-pay-later — store installments, PayPo, Klarna. Often 0%.
typeHints.other: Loan from a friend, family, employer or other informal arrangement.

ready.title: Ready!
ready.commitment: When I receive money — I open GigMoney first.

snowball.noDebts: You have no active debts. Great work!

deferred.pending_one: You have {{count}} deferred payment to catch up on
deferred.pending_other: You have {{count}} deferred payments to catch up on

new.title: New income
new.subtitle: How much did you receive? We'll split it together.

allocate.title: Distribution
allocate.defaultBiasNote: The split is calculated optimally. You can confirm it with one tap.

shortfall.title: Insufficient funds
shortfall.lossWarning: You will lose {{amount}} {{currency}} on uncovered essential expenses. Consider deferring a payment.
shortfall.advice: You can confirm the allocation and decide which payments to defer.

tips.food: Look for ways to reduce food expenses for the rest of the month
tips.transport: Try public transport or walking to save on transport costs
tips.contactCreditor: Contact your creditor and ask to defer the payment
tips.nextIncome: Your next income will cover the remaining needs

confirm.title: Summary
confirm.subtitle: Review the allocation and save when everything looks right.
confirm.saveNote: After saving, your income history will be updated.

list.title: Debts
list.empty: You don't have any debts yet.

form.label: Name
form.remainingAmountHint: Loan: remaining principal. Card: balance to repay.
form.minimumPaymentHint: Loan: installment amount. Card: minimum payment due.
form.interestRateHint: Annual rate from your contract, not APR. For PayPo/BNPL enter 0.
form.overdueAmountHint: Overdue payment amount from your bank, if any.
form.paymentDayHint: Day of the month when payment is due.
form.missedPaymentHint: This amount will be prioritized when you receive your next income.
form.missedPaymentSavedMessage: The missed payment will be covered first when you receive your next income.

debts.validationRemainingAmount: Enter an amount greater than 0 PLN.

edit.title: Edit debt
edit.closeConfirm: Are you sure you want to close this debt? This action cannot be undone.
edit.closedBadgeLabel: This debt is already closed and cannot be edited.

progress.title: Progress
progress.noDebts: You have no debts. Great work!

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: This will delete all your data. This action cannot be undone.

realityCheck.title: Reality Check
realityCheck.q1: Did you spend only on essentials this week?
realityCheck.q2: Could you reduce food expenses this month?
realityCheck.q3: Are your housing costs up to date?
realityCheck.q4: Did you use public transport to save money?
realityCheck.q5: Did you avoid any unnecessary purchases?
realityCheck.q6: Are you sticking to your debt repayment plan?

freshStart.title: Fresh Start!
freshStart.milestone7: You've been on track for a week! Keep going!
freshStart.milestone30: One month of progress! You're building real habits.
freshStart.milestone90: 90 days strong! Your dedication is paying off.
freshStart.newMonth: New month, fresh opportunities! Stay focused.
freshStart.newWeek: New week ahead — a chance to make progress!

celebration.title: Debt Paid Off!
celebration.message: You've completely paid off {{label}}! One less burden.

bank.subject: Request for payment restructuring
bank.body: Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing to request a restructuring of my obligation of {{amount}} {{currency}}. Due to temporary financial difficulties, I would like to arrange an installment plan or extended payment schedule. I am committed to meeting the agreed payment terms. Please contact me to discuss the options. Yours sincerely.

payday_lender.subject: Request for repayment extension
payday_lender.body: Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing to request an extension or installment plan for my obligation of {{amount}} {{currency}}. I am currently experiencing temporary financial difficulties but remain committed to repaying the full amount. Please let me know what repayment options are available. Yours sincerely.

landlord.subject: Notice of temporary payment difficulty
landlord.body: Dear Landlord, I am writing to inform you of temporary financial difficulties affecting my ability to pay {{amount}} {{currency}} on time. I am committed to settling the outstanding amount as soon as possible. I kindly ask for your understanding and would like to discuss a repayment arrangement. Yours sincerely.

private_person.subject: Regarding the loan repayment
private_person.body: Hi, I wanted to let you know that I'm going through some temporary financial difficulties and I'm unable to repay the full amount of {{amount}} {{currency}} right now. I really want to settle this and would like to work out a repayment plan in installments. I'm sorry for the delay and I appreciate your patience.

employer.subject: Request regarding financial obligation
employer.body: Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing regarding my obligation of {{amount}} {{currency}}. Due to temporary financial difficulties, I would like to discuss the possibility of an installment plan or a salary advance. I am open to any arrangement you may suggest. Yours sincerely.

other.subject: Request for payment deferral
other.body: Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing to request a deferral or installment plan for my obligation of {{amount}} {{currency}}. Due to temporary financial difficulties, I am unable to pay the full amount by the due date. I am committed to repaying according to an agreed schedule. Yours sincerely.
